evidence.claim: Shipped RAG-based feature and owns the evaluation framework
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Experience with ML operational tasks including A/B testing, drift monitoring, and retraining schedules
evidence.source_text: comfortable with the operational side — A/B testing, drift monitoring, retraining schedules.

evidence.claim: Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% via ranking model
Trained and shipped ranking models for discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Technical proficiency in Elasticsearch, Statistical Modeling, Learning to Rank, Recommendation Systems, Semantic Search, Fine-tuning LLMs, Image Classification, Pinecone, LLMs, QLoRA, Reinforcement Learning, PyTorch, and Next.js
Learns primarily through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
